sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103411" key="tetraki/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρᾰ-κίων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n103411.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with four pillars</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orph.</author> </bibl> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Εὐχή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
